name: git_status
description: Returns a structured view of the working tree status: staged changes, modified files, untracked files, branch position relative to upstream, and conflict markers. No raw porcelain parsing required by the agent.

primary.note: Git porcelain v1 format with --branch extension. Provides dual-status tracking (index vs worktree), rename detection, and submodule awareness.

dependencies.name: node
dependencies.note: Required to execute the normalization pipeline that parses porcelain output into structured JSON.

fallback.note: git status --short. Reduced fidelity — no branch ahead/behind counts, no upstream name, no rename tracking, no submodule detail.

path.description: Path to the Git repository or a subdirectory within it.

untracked_files.description: Control display of untracked files. 'all' shows individual files in untracked directories. 'normal' shows directories only. 'no' suppresses untracked files entirely.

ignored.description: Include ignored files in the output. Useful for auditing .gitignore coverage.

branch.description: Include branch name, upstream, and ahead/behind counts in the output.

renames.description: Enable rename detection. When false, renamed files appear as a deletion + addition pair.

submodules.description: Include submodule status in the output. When false, submodule changes are suppressed.

is_clean.description: True when there are no changes in the index or worktree, no untracked files, and no conflicts.

branch.description: Omitted entirely when branch input is false to preserve token density.

name.description: Current branch name or short commit SHA when detached.

upstream.description: Tracked upstream branch (e.g. origin/main). Null if no upstream is set.

ahead.description: Number of commits ahead of upstream.

detached.description: True when HEAD is not on a named branch.

files.description: Per-file change entries with dual-status tracking.

original_path.description: For renames, the source path. Omitted when not a rename.

index_status.description: Single-character status in the index (staged). ' ' = unmodified, M = modified, A = added, D = deleted, R = renamed, C = copied, U = updated but unmerged.

worktree_status.description: Single-character status in the worktree. Same codes as index_status, plus ? = untracked, ! = ignored.

modified.description: Files with a non-space worktree_status that is not ?, !, or U.

untracked.description: Files with worktree_status '?' (present only when untracked_files is not 'no').

ignored.description: Files with worktree_status '!' (present only when ignored is true).

warnings.description: Non-fatal advisories (e.g. large working tree, submodule errors).

pipeline.description: Parse porcelain v1 output into structured file entries and branch metadata. Extract XY status codes, path, original path for renames, and branch lines.
Roll up counts: staged, modified, untracked, conflicted, ignored. Set is_clean when all counts are zero and no files array entries exist.
Merge parsed files, branch object, summary roll-ups, and is_clean flag into the success envelope. Omit branch object when branch input is false.

output_gaps: branch name may be absent or incomplete
dual-status tracking simplified (no index vs worktree separation)
rename detection unavailable (renames shown as delete/add)
ignored files list may be incomplete

compatible_downstream.description: Pass modified or staged file paths to git_diff for detailed patch review.
Feed worktree-modified file paths into find_replace for bulk refactoring.
View the content of changed files to understand context before committing.
Search within the set of changed files for specific patterns or TODOs.

compatible_upstream.description: Receive a repository path from directory_list to scope the status check.
